results.details: scrape-user-data.yml exists, triggers on workflow_dispatch, runs maimai-scraper and chunithm-scraper based on config.json (using jq), and executes import_user_data.py with DATABASE_URL secret

refresh-songs.yml exists, triggers on weekly cron (0 0 * * 0) and workflow_dispatch, fetches from maimai.wonderhoy.me/api/musicData, commits to public/songs.json via git-auto-commit-action, only runs if maimai is in config.json games array

isolationContext: File content inspection only - no running services required for YAML structure validation
